features.name: hierarchy_with_mismatched_named_port_connections
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical module instantiation where named port connections use different names than the module's port declarations, causing equivalence checking to fail through multiple hierarchy levels

features.name: equiv_make_with_flatten_across_hierarchy
features.description: Code should include multiple modules where equivalence checking is performed using equiv_make with flatten directive across a two-level hierarchy chain
